chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-6867 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Direction For orders on CMA No.15419/2025 (Contempt/A) ---------------------------------------------- 09.10.2025 Petitioner in person Ms. Wajiha Maryam Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General Ms.Tayyeba Kayani, Collector Port Qasim ------------------------------ Mr. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, advocate, files power on behalf of Additional Collector of Customs (Appraisement), Port Muhammad Bin Qasim, which is taken on record. Compliance report on behalf of Collector of Customs, Port Muhammad Bin Qasim is taken on record, which reveals that compliance of this Court’s order dated 11.03.2025 has been made. Contempt application stands disposed of. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
